name: bento-all
description: Complete Bento skill pack with workflow, tracker, stack, and repository cleanup skills

interface.longDescription: Bento All bundles the full Bento marketplace into one Codex-ready plugin: workflow launch and landing guidance, repo cleanup, research support, tracker flows, and stack-specific implementation skills.
defaultPrompt: Launch a new implementation task with issue flow, branch setup, and a safe worktree plan.
Review this repository and recommend build-vs-buy options using the existing stack.
Clean up stale branches, worktrees, and partial work without losing useful context.
